programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacleboy let SpongeBob and Patrick in on their secret heroic origins in 'Mermaidman Begins', and in 'Plankton's Good Eye', Plankton uses SpongeBob's DNA to grow himself a second eye.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward and Plankton put on a play in 'Who's Afraid of Mr. Snippers?', then in 'A Fish Called Sandy', Sandy experiences life as a fish. (S15, ep 12)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Gary gets lost outside, he has to go on an incredible journey to get back home in 'Food Con Castaways', and then in 'Snail Mail', Spongebob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, and must keep it up!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his society of dullards and doofuses in 'The Nitwitting', then in 'The Ballad of Filthy Muck', Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in trash.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick and Sandy decide to turn their cabin into a pirate ship in 'Camp Crossbones', then in 'A Jelly Life', SpongeBob pretends to be a jellyfish for research purposes. (S1, ep 17)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in 'Krusty Koncessionaires', then in 'Dream Hoppers', SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbours.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like in 'Little Patscals', and then in 'The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show', Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family. (S1, ep 20)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick see who can hold a funny face the longest in 'Face Freeze!', then in 'Glove World R.I.P.', SpongeBob and Patrick spend one last day at Glove World before it closes down forever.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: Sandy creates a new invention to avoid doing chores in 'Are You Smarter Than A Smart Cabin', and then in 'Deep Sea Despot', Squidward takes over as Camp Master. (S1, ep 22)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob cares for the stray snails that start appearing around Bikini Bottom in 'Sanctuary!', while in 'What's Eating Patrick?', Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidward must survive together in the woods in 'Squisery', and in 'Game Night', The adults sneak away to play a board game, but they have to hide from one camper in particular. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's computer wife Karen ends up working at the Krusty Krab after being replaced by a newer model in 'Karen 2.0', and in 'InSPONGEiac', SpongeBob can't get to sleep, and asks Patrick to help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Patrick suddenly grows a beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up in 'Squidward's School For Grown-Ups', and then in 'Oral Report', SpongeBob must face his fear of public speaking.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, and move away, to Squidward's glee, in 'Sold!', and in 'Lame and Fortune', Plankton realises he can twist fortune cookies to suit his evil plot.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The show finds an adorable new star in 'Patty-Poo', then in 'Swaptoberfest', the Star family swap identities. (S3, ep 7)

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina report the news in 'Nitwit Neighbourhood News', then in 'Mid-Season Finale', The Patrick Show presents the epic conclusion to the first half of its first season. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results in 'Krabby Patty Creature Feature', then in 'Teacher's Pests', Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick's behaviour in 'The Fishbowl', and then in 'Married to Money', Mr Krabs takes Plankton's advice and finally marries the only thing he ever loved... money!

programme.title: Kamp Koral
programme.desc: It's Kamp Koral's first ever Wild West Day in 'A Finful of Sand Dollars', then in 'Cretins of the Night', SpongeBob and Patrick become vampires for a night. (S2, ep 11)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day disturbed by Sandy in 'Squirrel Jelly', then in 'The String', SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: Kamp Koral

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacleboy let SpongeBob and Patrick in on their secret heroic origins in 'Mermaidman Begins', and in 'Plankton's Good Eye', Plankton uses SpongeBob's DNA to grow himself a second eye.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: All day long - classic 80s love songs from the NOW That's What I Call Music archive. Timeless anthems of passion and heartbreak.

programme.title: The Truth About Franco:...
programme.desc: ...Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship: The Rise to Power: At the end of a bloody civil war, Francisco Franco seized power and ruled Spain with an iron hand for nearly four decades. (Part 1 of 4) (S)

programme.title: The Truth About Franco:...
programme.desc: ...Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship: The New Regime: Franco gave himself the title of Caudillo de España - Supreme Leader of Spain - and created his own rituals of power. (Part 2 of 4) (S)

programme.title: The Truth About Franco:...
programme.desc: ... Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship: Zero Hour: At the end of the Second World War, the cards in global politics were reshuffled, and the situation became critical for Franco. (Part 3 of 4) (S)

programme.title: The Truth About Franco:...
programme.desc: ...Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship: The Leaden Age: In the mid-1950s Franco's foreign policy successes opened up new perspectives for Spain - and new challenges. (Part 4 of 4) (S)

programme.title: Franco: the Last Inquisitor
programme.desc: Franco experienced a remarkable rise through the ranks of the Spanish army. The Civil War became his opportunity to seize absolute power in Spain. (Part 1 of 2) (S)

programme.desc: Having come to power through a coup, General Franco manoeuvred from 1939 until his death in 1975 to remain in control. (Part 2 of 2) (S)
